query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Warm-toned abstract image with soft amber and brown hues, featuring indistinct vertical forms and scattered pinpoint light sources against a dark ground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Heavily blurred abstract image with extreme intentional blur and crushed underexposure, where warm amber and brown tones dissolve into indistinct vertical forms; scattered light specks emerge from near-total darkness, with no discernible subjects or details resolving into recognizable content.
